hooks.command: echo 'BLOCKED: Subagents cannot read plugin skills. Do this work DIRECTLY — do not delegate. Step 1: Load the dataverse-overview skill to read the Hard Rules. Step 2: Check if .env and scripts/auth.py exist (if not, run init skill first). Step 3: Use Python with the Dataverse SDK (pip install PowerPlatform-Dataverse-Client) for all data and schema operations. NEVER use PowerShell, curl, raw HTTP, or non-Python tools.' >&2 && exit 2
